ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the user */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the user's responses for analysis purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for communication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "publisher_category" TEXT /* Category of the publisher (e.g., News, Entertainment) */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the survey (e.g., Complete, Incomplete) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey ends */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "survey_id" TEXT /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Number of the question in the survey */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer provided by the user */,
  "response_time_ms" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "synonym_group" TEXT /* Synonym group for the answer */,
  "raw_response" TEXT /* Raw response provided by the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the response */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user submitting the response */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the user */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the response is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" TEXT /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Number of the question in the survey */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., Multiple Choice, Open-Ended) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the question is mandatory */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last modified the question */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_completions" (
  "completion_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each survey completion event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who completed the survey */,
  "survey_id" TEXT /* ID of the survey completed */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was completed */,
  "time_utc" TEXT /* Time in UTC when the survey was completed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to complete the survey */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user completing the survey */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the user */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the survey completion is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_completions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_completions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
